_doc: The data contract between the game and each GUI document kind: which UiState keys the game populates every frame (bindable via a node's `bind`), what fields each list item map carries, and which widget ids / events the screen's controller reacts to. The gui-builder reads this to offer binding pickers and to seed preview sample data. Source of truth for behavior is the controller in src/app/shell_docs/ (or drive_doc_menu for menus); keep this file in sync when a controller's populate/handle changes.

has_selection.doc: a world is selected (enables Play / World Settings)

no_worlds.doc: true when the save list is empty

handles.worlds: list select = choose world; activate (double-click/Enter) = play
handles.keys: Up/Down move selection, Enter plays, Delete opens settings

mod_rows.doc: one row per installed mod pack

no_mods.doc: true when no packs are installed

renaming.doc: the inline rename editor is open

rename_text.doc: live rename input text (mirrored from the editor)

optimize_terrain.doc: the world's "Optimize explored terrain" setting (persist explored terrain for faster loads)

handles.mod_on: toggle (per row): enable/disable that pack for this world
handles.keys: Up/Down move, Enter toggles selected, Delete opens delete confirmation
handles.rename: click: open the inline rename editor (pencil)
handles.rename_input: text_input: new world name; Enter applies
handles.optimize_terrain: toggle: flip Optimize explored terrain for this world (writes settings.json; applies next open)

create_name.doc: live name input text (mirrored from the text_input)

can_create.doc: name is non-empty and unused (enables Create)

name_exists.doc: a world with this name already exists

is_host.doc: this session hosts the world (shows Save and Quit)

is_remote.doc: this session joined a remote server (shows Disconnect)

lan_open.doc: the host is open to LAN (shows the port label)

lan_closed.doc: host session not yet open to LAN (shows the Open to LAN button)

lan_status.doc: "Open on port N" once LAN is open

lan_error.doc: the last Open to LAN failure, inline

handles.open_lan: click: open the running host to LAN on port 7434
handles.disconnect: click: leave the remote server and return to title
handles.save_quit: click: save and return to title (host only)
handles.keys: Enter resumes (ESC also resumes, via the global close control)
handles.options: click: open the Options screens (Back returns to pause)

active_slot.doc: the selected hotbar slot (bind on the slot_grid's `selected`)

petramond:hotbar.notes: HUD only: presentation-driven. Hearts/status effects and chat overlays are host-drawn beside/over the document.

petramond:inventory.notes: container: slots route to the game automatically by role; no custom keys

petramond:furniture_workbench.notes: container: slots route by role; result icons grey out automatically when not craftable

<any key a mod sets via GuiStateSet>.doc: the mod's tick-owned GUI state map is mirrored into UiState every frame

handles.<button id>: click: dispatched to the owning mod as gui_click (primary clicks only)

sleep_count.doc: 'x/y players sleeping' from the replicated player rows + self

sleep_count_visible.doc: true only with more than one connected player

handles.leave_bed: click: cancel the sleep and wake beside the bed
handles.keys: ESC cancels the sleep (global close control)

handles.respawn: click: respawn at the bed spawn (or a fresh surface spot) on the tick
handles.save_quit: click: save and return to title
handles.keys: ESC is swallowed; only the buttons leave the death screen

server_addr.doc: live address input text (prefilled from client.json last_server; :port optional, default 7434)

player_name.doc: live player-name input text (prefilled from the resolved player name)

has_status.doc: status_text is non-empty (shows the danger label)

connecting.doc: a connect attempt is running (shows the progress label + Cancel)

can_connect.doc: both fields non-empty and no attempt running (enables Connect)

handles.cancel: click: abandon the running attempt (stays on this screen)
handles.back: click: cancel and return to title (ESC does the same)

missing_rows.doc: one row per server mod this client lacks

handles.back: click: back to the connect screen, address preserved (Enter too)

disconnect_message.doc: why the session ended (server closed / connection lost / world stopped)

show_backdrop.doc: title flow (no game) shows the screenshot backdrop

handles.back: click: back to the title or the pause menu (wherever Options was opened from)

show_backdrop.doc: title flow (no game) shows the screenshot backdrop

master_pct.doc: master volume as a percent label

sound_pct.doc: sound volume as a percent label

music_pct.doc: music volume as a percent label

handles.master_vol: slider: master volume (live; committed persists client.json)
handles.back: click: back to the Options root

show_backdrop.doc: title flow (no game) shows the screenshot backdrop

bind:<action>.doc: current binding label per action (walk_forward, strafe_right, strafe_left, walk_backward, jump, attack, interact, hotbar_next, hotbar_prev, open_inventory, chat, sprint, sneak); '> ??? <' while armed

remap_hint.doc: the fixed hint line: how to rebind, or the capture instructions while a remap is armed

handles.bind:<action>: click: arm this action for remap (clicking another action switches; clicking the armed one cancels). The app then captures the next raw key/mouse/scroll; ESC cancels.
handles.back: click: cancel any remap and return to the Options root

show_backdrop.doc: title flow (no game) shows the screenshot backdrop

vd_label.doc: view distance as an 'N chunks' label

particles_label.doc: the particles cycle button text (Particles: Full/Reduced/Off)

handles.view_distance: slider: view distance in chunks; the release commit applies it live (replica, streaming, fog) and persists
handles.particles: click: cycle particles Full -> Reduced -> Off (applies live, persists)
handles.back: click: back to the Options root
